Pass Criteria: Install source is Poseidon.Installer.msi or Poseidon.Bundle.exe
Post-install provisioning-check exits 0 for valid install
model-manifest.json exists with schema version and SHA-256 hashes
appsettings.user.json exists and parses as JSON
Production config uses protected secret references and no plaintext secrets
Runtime enters Full Degraded or Recovery deterministically
No ingestion or watcher service starts before provisioning or Recovery
Valid full install launches without setup wizard
Invalid config or missing model enters Recovery with diagnostics
Signed management requests are required outside development
startup.log contains provisioning and runtime state decisions
Uninstall completes without leaving broken shortcuts
